name: Cataas
description: Retrieve paginated cat-image metadata and the available tag vocabulary from the public Cat as a Service API.

auth.hint: No authentication is required for the selected public read operations.

tools.name: list_cats
tools.description: List cat-image metadata with optional tag filtering and pagination.

params.name: tags
params.description: Comma-separated tags used to filter cats.

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of matching records to skip.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of cat records to return.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: Return the tags available for filtering cat images.
